infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs your location to show missing persons in your area and help track them.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs background location to continuously track missing persons and alert you when you are near a case.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app needs background location to continuously track missing persons and alert you when you are near a case.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Lost Person Alert to use your location to track missing persons in your area and alert you when you are near a case.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Lost Person Alert to use your location in the background to continuously monitor for missing persons near you.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Lost Person Alert to use your location to show missing persons in your area on the map.
